...The world is so unfair. There are guys who have not only Elly but even the maid's
daughter serving them, and yet all I can do is jerk off pointlessly...
条件ごとにボイスチャンネルを変える
...... I'm on duty, don't talk to me.
Guest? I apologize, but the master has stepped away... ......

...You're from the village, aren't you? In that case...have you seen our master
around here recently? An elderly gentleman wearing luxurious clothes with gold
embroidery.

For some reason, our master seems to have taken an interest in your village... He
often sneaks out of the mansion at night and heads toward the village. If you've seen
someone like that recently......
I see...thank you. If you do see him, please let me know.

For some reason, the master was fixated on your village's assembly hall. There were
many times when he would sneak out of the mansion on stormy nights, only to be found
collapsed in front of the assembly hall...

I suspect this disappearance is also to investigate that place... but his body is
being consumed by illness, and he is in no condition to push himself. So we must
bring him back to the mansion as quickly as possible, no matter what...
